testcase.name: test_right_panel_source_text_masked_before_overlay

failure.message: AssertionError: BUG (b) NOT FIXED: no draw_rect (white mask) call found before overlay. Expected right-panel source text to be masked before translated overlay. assert []

testcase.failure: tests/test_table_border_protection.py:326: in test_right_panel_source_text_masked_before_overlay assert draw_rect_indices, ( E AssertionError: BUG (b) NOT FIXED: no draw_rect (white mask) call found before overlay. Expected right-panel source text to be masked before translated overlay. E assert []
